userStories.title: Add task status storage
userStories.description: As a user, I want task status values stored so pending, in progress, and done persist.
acceptanceCriteria: Task records store a status value.

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want a backend action that updates task status so changes save reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: A backend action updates task status.

userStories.title: Show task status badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want a status badge on each task card so I can see current state at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards show the current status as a badge.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task status control
userStories.description: As a user, I want a task status control in the list so I can change status without opening a separate flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can change a task status from the task list.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter tasks by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so I can focus on one state.
acceptanceCriteria: The task list can be filtered by status.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
